# SSH 下载文件
# 替换 YOUR_HOST / YOUR_PASSWORD 为实际值后运行
#
# 下载到本地指定路径
# 编码前: {"host": "YOUR_HOST", "port": 22, "user": "root", "password": "YOUR_PASSWORD", "action": "download", "local_path": "/local/save.txt", "remote_path": "/remote/file.txt"}
aitk SSH_

# 下载到目录并指定文件名
# 编码前: {"host": "YOUR_HOST", "port": 22, "user": "root", "password": "YOUR_PASSWORD", "action": "download", "local_path": "/local/dir/", "remote_path": "/remote/file.txt", "file_name": "downloaded.txt"}
aitk SSH_
